items.title: Salesforce.com (CRM) Rises Higher Than Market: Key Facts
items.description: Salesforce.com (CRM) closed the most recent trading day at $244.5, moving +1.15% from the previous trading session.

items.title: Palantir Achieved ‘Eye-Popping Growth’ and Is a Buy Through Year-End, According to Wedbush
items.description: Palantir stock has returned nearly 3,000% over the last three years and trades at a lofty valuation today, largely due to its stellar growth estimates.

items.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: The Dow closed at a record high on Tuesday, but the Nasdaq ended the lower as investors shifted away from technology stocks.

items.title: ElevenLabs Launches Advanced Capabilities for Enterprise AI Agents at Inaugural Summit
items.description: SAN FRANCISCO, November 11, 2025--Today, ElevenLabs, the leading AI audio research and product company, unveiled major enhancements to its Agents platform at its inaugural ElevenLabs Summit, introducing capabilities that make conversational AI agents more reliable, easier to integrate with internal systems, and more accurate in their understanding. ElevenLabs’ Agents platform enables users to create and deploy bespoke conversational AI agents that can solve complex tasks – from cold calling to s

items.title: Salesforce to Acquire Spindle AI, Deepening AI Push
items.description: Startup will join Agentforce to power smarter business insights
